sls.tf
Home Documentation GitHub

sls.tf

Serverless Framework to Terraform Conversion

Transform your Serverless Framework applications into production-ready Terraform infrastructure with a single module. Deploy AWS resources with confidence using infrastructure as code best practices.

Get Started View on GitHub

Powerful Features

Everything you need to convert and deploy serverless applications

📋

Configuration Parsing

Support for both YAML and TypeScript configurations with comprehensive validation and intelligent error handling.

⚡

Auto-Generation

Automatically creates Lambda functions, API Gateway, DynamoDB tables, and all necessary AWS resources with proper IAM roles.

🔧

Advanced Support

Variable resolution, custom CloudFormation resources, EventBridge integration, and TypeScript async exports.

🛡️

Production Ready

Built-in best practices, security hardening, monitoring integration, and disaster recovery capabilities.

Getting Started

Convert your Serverless Framework application in minutes

1

Add sls.tf Module

Add the sls.tf submodule to your project and initialize it.

2

Create Terraform Config

Create a simple Terraform configuration that references your serverless.yml file.

3

Deploy Infrastructure

Run Terraform commands to deploy your converted infrastructure to AWS.
